name: Kale Sandwich
recipeIngredient: 3 large Whole kale leaves, washed and trimmed
2 tbsp Dijon or spicy brown mustard
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam the kale for 2 minutes and drain off any liquid.
2. Do not chop—keep the leaves in large pieces.
3. Sprinkle with lemon juice and garlic powder and chill.
4. When ready to serve, cut the pita bread in half.
5. Spread each pocket with mustard.
6. Stuff with the cold seasoned kale.
